heading: Supplies on fish processing vessels
label: 55115 Supplies on fish processing vessels
text: does not apply to supplies aboard a United States documented fish processing vessel that are necessary and used for processing or assembling fishery products aboard such a vessel.Section 55102 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5511546 App.:883 (10th proviso).(10th proviso), ; , ; , , .June 5, 1920, ch. 250, § 2741 Stat. 999July 2, 1935, ch. 35549 Stat. 442Pub. L. 97–389, title V, § 50496 Stat. 1956Dec. 29, 1982The words “ does not apply to” are substituted for “for the purposes of this section” and “shall be considered ship’s equipment and not merchandise” for consistency in the chapter.Section 55102 of this title
